payload.title: Guard: local path parity — scope serve unchanged, public site cloud-only
payload.description: Regression guard spanning epics SCP-167 + SCP-176. Assert the local path is unchanged when SCOPE_CLOUD is unset: (1) GET / on a local hub serves the kanban app SPA, NOT a landing page; (2) no /auth/* or public-site routes are mounted in non-cloud mode; (3) loopback bypass still authenticates same-machine requests; (4) LAN mTLS device-cert auth still works; (5) no Postgres/OIDC dependency is required to run locally. Add automated tests so a future cloud change cannot silently regress local/offline behavior.
